morning.title: Some investors question SpaceX's projected $1.77T valuation
morning.summary: Investors are questioning SpaceX's projected $1.77T valuation due to concerns over its $4.3B loss on $4.7B in revenue in Q1.

morning.title: Former a16z GP John O'Farrell criticizes the AI industry
morning.summary: Former a16z GP John O'Farrell criticizes the AI industry and his ex-partners for spending hundreds of millions to fight regulation.

morning.title: IBM CEO says there is 'no way' spending on AI data centers will pay off
morning.summary: IBM CEO says there is 'no way' spending on AI data centers will pay off, citing concerns over the high costs and limited returns.

morning.title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
morning.summary: Google DeepMind is worried about the potential consequences of millions of agents interacting with each other, citing concerns over safety and control.

morning.title: Context compression finally works in production: new research cuts LLM input 16x without the accuracy hit
morning.summary: New research has developed a context compression technique that can cut LLM input by 16x without affecting accuracy, potentially improving efficiency and performance.

morning.title: Why China is betting on big nuclear reactors
morning.summary: China is investing heavily in big nuclear reactors, citing the need for clean and reliable energy sources to support its growing economy and population.

morning.title: The first complex cells had genes from a complex mix of species
morning.summary: Scientists have discovered that the first complex cells had genes from a complex mix of species, challenging traditional theories of cellular evolution.

morning.title: Several things I like about macOS 27 Golden Gate that have nothing to do with AI
morning.summary: The author discusses several features of macOS 27 Golden Gate that they like, including improvements to the user interface and new productivity tools.

morning.title: Microsoft’s open-source SkillOpt automatically upgrades AI agent skills without touching model weights
morning.summary: Microsoft has released an open-source tool called SkillOpt that can automatically upgrade AI agent skills without modifying the underlying model weights.

morning.title: What AI benchmarks miss about real-world performance
morning.summary: The article discusses the limitations of AI benchmarks in measuring real-world performance, citing factors such as data quality and deployment environments.
